name: In Youth
overview: Li Ziyu, a kind-hearted newcomer at a PR firm, struggles under her demanding boss, Fan Shuchen, a wealthy heir who distrusts her due to company leaks. As their relationship shifts from suspicion to admiration, doubts resurface when Shuchen’s friends and rival question Ziyu’s true identity. Can their growing feelings survive the mystery surrounding her past?

trailers.title: 《趁我们还年轻》定档预告 4月16日YouTube独家上线 勇敢追爱放肆追梦 In Youth【捷成华视偶像剧场】
